receiptsSearch.title: Retrieve a receipt
receiptsSearch.description: If you have already made a payment, fill in the required fields and look for your receipt.

tab1.description: Enter the Notice Code (or IUV) and Tax Code to start searching for the receipt. If you do not have the Tax Code, you can still retrieve the receipt.

tab2.description: Enter the Notice Code (or IUV) and VAT number to start the receipt search.

noData.title: We found no matching receipts
noData.text: Check the information you entered and try again

debtPositionsSearch.title: Search for an notice
debtPositionsSearch.description: Retrieve a payment notice by filling in the fields with the required data.

noData.title: We found no matching notices
noData.text: Check the data entered and try again.

user.title: Your data
user.subtitle: This data is derived from your SPID or CIE. To change them, contact your digital identity provider.

empty.title: Your cart is empty
empty.description: Add one or more notices to your cart to proceed with payment

items.alert: The amount updates automatically, so you always pay what you owe and avoid penalties or other interest. <link1>Do you want to know more?</link1>
items.full: You cannot add more than 5 notices to your cart
items.info: You can pay up to 5 notices together

installmentsDrawer.title: Your installment plan
installmentsDrawer.description: Check your installments, check amounts and due dates, and select the ones you want to pay now.

receiptDetail.title: Detail
receiptDetail.subtitle: You can look up the receipt data corresponding to your research and download it.
receiptDetail.downloadError: The receipt could not be retrieved.

assistance.title: How can we help you?
assistance.description: If you need support using the portal, please enter the required details to get help.
assistance.cardDescription: Please enter the email address where you would like to receive replies from customer support.
assistance.input1Helper: Please enter a valid email address
assistance.privacy: By continuing you are stating that you have read the <link1> Privacy Policy </link1> of the Citizen Assistance Service
assistance.modalTitle: Do you really want to quit?
assistance.modalDescription: If you leave, the request for assistance will be lost.

auth.title: Access your personal profile
auth.description: Manage your pagoPA payment notices and view receipts quickly and easily.

noAuth.title: Are you in a hurry?
noAuth.description: Make a spontaneous payment or retrieve a receipt from a payment already made, all without logging in.

IOAlert.title: Want to access your receipts and pay notices faster?
IOAlert.description: View and manage your payment methods and all your receipts

retry.title: We are unable to retrieve the data due to a problem.

receipts.subtitle: Here you will find receipts made out to you. If you are looking for receipts in someone else's name, click on
receipts.viewDetail: View the detail for the transaction

empty.title: Here you will see your receipts
empty.subtitle: You'll find them here after paying a debt position through any authorized channel.

empty.title: There are no outstanding debts.
empty.subtitle: To make a payment, enter your position information via the "Make a Payment" button.

list.title: Amounts to be paid
list.subtitle: Here you will find notices that are yet to be paid or already started in installments. If you are looking for a notice in someone else's name, click on

download.title: Download in progress
download.subtitle: If it does not start automatically, <link>download the alert manually</link>.

preview.title: Search your pagoPA payment notices
preview.description: This section contains a list of notices that have been communicated to us by the payees.

empty.title: We haven't found a notice to pay.
empty.description: If you have received a pagoPA notice, press 'Pay a Notice' and enter the information.

paidByMe.title: Here you will see receipts for payments made by you
paidByMe.text: If you paid through another channel, to get a receipt, contact the payee.

ownedByMe.title: Here you will see receipts for payments made out to you
ownedByMe.text: If you don't find a receipt, contact the creditor agency.

error.description: We are unable to recover the data because of a problem.

paymentNotices.title: Your payment notices
paymentNotices.loading: We are searching through the archives of the creditor agencies participating in the service...

bottomAlert.info: Payment notices have been communicated to us by the Payee. If you have any problems, please contact the institution.

noticesAlert.info: These are the payment notices that entities have communicated to PagoPA. If you do not find a notice, contact the Payee or press 'Pay a Notice' and enter the data.

optin.title: Do you allow PagoPA to search your notices?
optin.body: If you confirm, you allow PagoPA to search for payment notices in your name among the archives of the institution participating in the service.
optin.privacy: By continuing you agree to the <a1>Privacy Policy</a1> and the <a2>Terms and Conditions of Use</a2> of the service.

transactionDetail.title: Operation detail
transactionDetail.downloadReceiptError: The receipt could not be retrieved.
transactionDetail.noReceipt: The pagoPA receipt is not available. Contact the payee if you need the payment receipt, which is the document certifying that you have settled a debt.
transactionDetail.subject: Item
transactionDetail.totalLabel: The total amount includes {{fee}} commission, charged by {{psp}}

card2.title: How much and when to pay?

modal.title: Do you see a different amount?
modal.description: pagoPA automatically updates the amount to ensure that you have paid exactly what you owe and thus avoid penalties or other interest.

fields.anonymous: I don't have a tax code

toast.403: You do not have permissions to perform this action.
toast.500: Server error, please try again later.
toast.default: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
toast.drawer: Error while adding to payment cart. Please try again later.
toast.payment: Error during payment. Please try again later.

default.title: Something didn't work
default.body: We are working to fix it as soon as possible. Please try again later.

400.title: Something didn't work
400.body: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again in a few minutes.

401.title: Your session has expired
401.body: Sign in to keep using the site.

403.title: The page you are looking for is not available
403.body: You can go back to the homepage or visit a new page

404.title: The page you are looking for does not exist
404.body: You can return to the homepage or visit a new page

408.title: It was not possible to access
408.body: A problem occurred while logging in. Please try again in a few minutes.

420.title: Payment completed
420.body: Your payment has been successfully received.

422.title: We cannot proceed with the payment
422.body: To get more information about the notice contact the Payee.

424.title: The payment failed
424.body: You can try again or download the pagoPA notice and pay at all enabled channels.

425.title: You cancelled the payment
425.body: If you wish, you can download the pagoPA notice and pay at all enabled channels.

423.title: We were unable to initiate payment
423.body: Try again in a few minutes.

500.title: Server error
500.body: A server error occurred. Please try again later.

card1.title: Have you received a payment notice?
card1.description: You already have the codes or a QR code to proceed with payment

card2.title: Do you want to make a spontaneous payment?
card2.description: You want to pay the civil service because you feel like it and because you are a good

form.description: Complete the required steps and proceed with payment.

step1.title: Select the beneficiary institution
step1.description: Start typing the name of the Institution receiving the payment and select it from the list.

debtor.noFiscalCode: I don't have a tax code

step4.title: Check the data entered
step4.description: The payment will be valid only for the municipality you have selected

step5.title: How do you want to pay?
step5.description: You can choose to pay online now or download the notice and pay later.

pay.title: Pay online
pay.description: You can pay by card, bank transfer, or payment app.

download.title: Download the payment notice
download.description: You can use it to pay at cash desks, banks and other places that take pagoPA payments.

errors.description: Reason for payment too short or missing
errors.fullName: Enter your first and last name
errors.org: Selection of the Institution is mandatory
errors.debtType: Select a service from the list above or from the list of most frequently used services

download.title: The notice is currently being downloaded
download.help: If it does not start automatically, <link1>download the alert manually</link1>.
